name: SBI Cashback
rewards: The card is specifically categorized under Cashback Cards, implying cashback benefits.
Cardholders have the opportunity to earn reward points.
Earned reward points can be redeemed by cardholders.
perks: The card offers access to various Insurance benefits.
It includes the One Assist Card Protection Plan for enhanced card security.
Add-on-Cards are available for family members of the primary cardholder.
Cardholders can conveniently pay utility bills and recharge services.
The card supports Contactless Payment for quick and secure transactions.
Eligible cardholders may access opportunities for Card Upgrades.
Benefit from Airport Lounge Access facilities.
Convert eligible transactions into easy Flexipay EMIs.
Balance Transfer and Balance Transfer on EMI facilities are provided.
A wide array of online payment modes, including Mobile App, UPI, and QR Codes via YONO, are supported for convenient payments.
